meta.purpose: LLM prompt to generate an Astro static page for Amazon Kindle & Fire repair services

constraints.rendering: Static HTML only — zero client-side JavaScript unless explicitly marked as `client:load` island
constraints.styling: Tailwind CSS using semantic design tokens from the provided CSS variables. NEVER use raw color values (no `bg-blue-500`, no `text-white`). Use `bg-primary`, `text-foreground`, `bg-muted`, etc.
constraints.fonts: Inter via Google Fonts, loaded in <head> with `font-display: swap`
constraints.icons: Inline SVG only — no icon library runtime. Copy SVG paths from Lucide (https://lucide.dev). Each icon must have `aria-hidden="true"` and `focusable="false"`.
constraints.images: All `` tags MUST have `alt`, `width`, `height`, and `loading="lazy"` (except hero which uses `loading="eager"`). Use Astro `` component where possible.
constraints.links_internal: Standard `<a href="/path">` — NO client-side router. All internal links must start with `/`.
constraints.links_external: All external `<a>` tags MUST have `target="_blank"` and `rel="noopener noreferrer"`.
constraints.accessibility: All interactive elements must be keyboard-accessible. Use semantic HTML (`<nav>`, `<main>`, `<section>`, `<article>`, `<footer>`). Buttons must have visible focus rings.
constraints.accordions: Use native `<details>` + `<summary>` elements. NO JavaScript accordions.
forbidden: useState, useEffect, or any React hooks
Any content not present in this JSON

page.metaTitle: Amazon Kindle & Fire Tablet Repair Winnipeg | E-Reader Specialists
page.metaDescription: Expert Kindle e-reader and Fire tablet repair in Winnipeg. E-Ink screen replacement, battery service, charging port repair. Same-day service available.
page.h1: Winnipeg's Kindle & Fire Tablet Repair Experts
page.heroDescription: From cracked E-Ink displays to dead batteries, we specialize in Amazon device repairs.

heroImage.alt: Amazon Kindle & Fire repair services in Winnipeg

services.name: Screen Replacement
services.description: We replace E-Ink and LCD displays on all Kindle and Fire models.

services.name: Battery Replacement
services.description: Restore your device's battery life for extended reading or streaming.

services.name: Charging Port Repair
services.description: Fix loose or damaged USB-C and micro-USB charging ports.

services.name: Speaker Repair
services.description: Restore clear audio on your Fire tablet.

services.name: Water Damage Recovery
services.description: Liquid exposure? We can assess and recover water-damaged devices.

advantage_pillars.title: Amazon Device Experts
advantage_pillars.description: We specialize in Kindle e-readers and Fire tablets.

advantage_pillars.title: E-Ink Display Specialists
advantage_pillars.description: Expertise in delicate E-Ink screen technology.

advantage_pillars.title: Extended Battery Life
advantage_pillars.description: Quality battery replacements to restore weeks of reading time.

advantage_pillars.title: Warranty on Every Repair
advantage_pillars.description: Screen repairs from 30 days to lifetime. 90-day battery warranty.

model_categories.title: Kindle E-Readers
model_categories.description: E-Ink display repairs and battery replacements.

models_description: We repair all Amazon Kindle e-readers and Fire tablets, including latest generations and discontinued models.

pricing_micro_copy.costDriver: Kindle and Fire tablet repair costs depend on the device. Amazon's device support pages cover troubleshooting.
pricing_micro_copy.priceShock: An E-Ink screen replacement can approach the cost of a new Kindle. iFixit's Kindle teardowns illustrate why E-Ink displays are costly to replace.
pricing_micro_copy.advisory: If the repair cost approaches your device's value, we'll explain that clearly.
pricing_micro_copy.fallback: Your content is typically tied to your Amazon account and will sync to a new device.

faqs.question: Can you replace a cracked E-Ink screen on my Kindle?
faqs.answer: Yes! We can replace damaged E-Ink displays on most Kindle models.

faqs.question: How long does a Kindle battery replacement take?
faqs.answer: Most can be completed within 1-2 hours.

faqs.question: My Fire tablet won't charge. Can you fix it?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Charging port issues are common and we can repair or replace damaged USB ports.

faqs.question: Do you repair older Kindle models?
faqs.answer: We service most Kindle and Fire models. Contact us.

faqs.question: Will I lose my books and content after repair?
faqs.answer: In most cases, your Amazon account content remains intact.

service_area_note: Serving St. Vital, Thompson, and surrounding Manitoba communities.

locations.name: St. Vital Centre
locations.address: 1225 St Mary's Rd, Winnipeg, MB R2M 5E5

validation_checklist: Page has exactly ONE <h1> tag matching the `page.h1` field
All services render with inline SVG icons, not an icon library import
All FAQ items use <details>/<summary>, not JS accordions
All external links have target='_blank' rel='noopener noreferrer'
All three JSON-LD blocks are injected in <head>
No React, Preact, or JSX runtime in the build output
Hero image has loading='eager'; all other images have loading='lazy'
Page renders fully without JavaScript enabled
All color classes use Tailwind semantic tokens (bg-primary, text-foreground, etc.)
Phone links use tel: protocol; SMS links use sms: protocol
Section IDs match table_of_contents entries for anchor navigation
No placeholder content — every string comes from this JSON
